title: American Screening Rumors Thread
wikitext:
[]: American Screening Rumors Thread             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 3:28 am This is just something I want to be true, but... New York Anime Festival's guest of honor is Kobun Shizuno , who is the co-director of Weva 1.0. Also, there will be a special , currently secret screening screening at the ImaginAsian. to quote the site For all the details on this still top secret screening, check back closer to the New York Anime Festival. This screening is an event you don't want to miss!

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sat Nov 17, 2007 4:02 am new york is not convenient. much sorrow. add a date too.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 17, 2007 4:07 am Well, if they're screening it at the NYAF, I'll go.

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:30 am Well, I can't think of anything out right now in Japan that might be hot. Pokemon Movie 10? Oh, Hero might be, but odds are looking in Evangelion's favor. I just wish they had stuff like this in Australia. Maybe we are closer to a DVD release then we think.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 17, 2007 7:42 am Paprika was screened at the NY Film Festival October 2006, and in theatres in NYC and LA this May, but there hasn't been an R1 DVD release of it yet (actually, just checked, release date of DVD is 11/27). So it took over a year after it was screened in the States. Let's hope it doesn't take Rebuild that long.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 8:18 am NY is a bit far for me to go for only a movie, pitty. Hopefully they will take the screening on the road and hit other markets.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 11:00 am Most likely, they won't take it elsewhere. If it's even screening there.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Nov 17, 2007 11:39 am We-ell... I can't think of any other huge anime event from recent times... Now, would it be subtitled at this event?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 11:41 am I would assume so, there were English subtitles for the Korean showing, I doubt they'd show it in just Japanese at the American showing (assuming there is one).

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Nov 17, 2007 11:53 am It's not really a question of getting to New York for me; I have family members who go there regularly. In fact, my grandmother's there right now. It's a question of if December 8th will work. And, of course, there's the question of if this really is the movie in question. I'm about 80% sure it is, though, what with it being the biggest anime release recently and the first guest of honor listed being the co-director.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 17, 2007 11:56 am I had posted a while back that Kobun Shizuno is going to be a guest at NYAF, but never thought of a possibility that they'd be screening the movie there. It was announced at ANN when I happened to be lurking around.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Nov 17, 2007 12:37 pm Ornette wrote: Well, if they're screening it at the NYAF, I'll go.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 1:01 pm Ornette wrote: Well, if they're screening it at the NYAF, I'll go.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 3:33 pm Hey, it's New York. I bet there will be bootlegs on the street before the movie even runs. :P

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:48 pm I am an hour's travel (give or take) from NYC: how do we get tickets for this event? (if it is indeed Eva)

[]:             Quote Post by Avatar of Dreams » Sat Nov 17, 2007 11:39 pm You can buy tickets on the website cat posted. If they are showing Eva, I'm totally there.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Tue Nov 20, 2007 8:47 am If they confirm it, then I'm making a road trip... Just my luck, you'll probably have to have one those stupid-expensive gold tickets to get in.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 20, 2007 1:54 pm *sigh* It's a shame Fall Quarter will be wrapping up then or else maybe I could do my long overdue visit back to the Mothership then. Then again, are we even certain this WOULD be Webuild?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Nov 20, 2007 6:13 pm I'm not certain. I'm putting forth a theory based on available evidence. I could be dead wrong. But this is what I hope, and this is what makes sense to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Toonces » Wed Nov 21, 2007 12:24 am If this gets confirmed I'm going too. I'm excited.
